response.original_title: Richard Strauss : La femme sans ombre Festival d’Aix-en-Provence 2026
response.overview: After marrying the emperor of the south-eastern islands, the daughter of the king of the spirits lost her magical powers without acquiring the shadow that would seal her place in the human world. Under the baton of Klaus Mäkelä, Barrie Kosky transforms Strauss’s most ambitious opera into an allegory of the awakening of consciousness.
response.title: Richard Strauss : La femme sans ombre Festival d’Aix-en-Provence 2026
